Headline: #119 Michigan/119th and #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute near Michigan/119th
ShortDescription: #119 Michigan/119th and #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Michigan/119th due to street blockage near Michigan/119th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#119 Michigan/119th and #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Michigan/119th due to street blockage near Michigan/119th.

#34 South Michigan buses will operate via 127th, State, 115th, Michigan and over regular route.

#119 Michigan/119th buses will operate via 119th, State, 115th, Michigan and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #87 87th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 87th/Halsted
ShortDescription: EB 87 87th buses are temp. rerouted via 87th, Vincennes, 86th Pl., Halsted, then resume their normal route on 87th due to street blockage near 87th/Halsted.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Vincennes, 86th Pl., Halsted, then resume their normal route on 87th due to street blockage near 87th/Halsted.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running with wait times of up to 20 minutes; we're working to restore service. Allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running, but with extended wait times. Some riders may experience wait times of up to 20 minutes while our crews work to restore regular service levels.

Use trackers to look for live arrival information and consider available alternatives, such a local bus routes or buses to/from other 'L' lines.

Allow extra travel time.
